strategic_objective: Clarify the nature, stability, and class-conditioning of strong feature dependencies to assess redundancy and dimensionality reduction potential.
key_checks: Compare dependency strength across benign and attack classes
Assess if dependencies arise from protocol behavior or feature engineering
Evaluate consistency of dependencies over time and network conditions
success_criteria: Evidence that dependencies are stable or vary with class conditioning
Identification of dependencies inherent to protocol vs engineered artifacts
Determination of redundancy exploitable for feature reduction without information loss
router_constraints: preserve evidence refs e13 to e22
